sections.sectionTitle: Ganhing a Siang leh a Nin

verses.text: Topa in Moses leh Aaron tungah
“Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen un: Hihte pen leitunga om ganhing khempeuh lak panin na nek theih ding uh a nungta ganhing ahi hi
Ganhingte lak panin a khecin a ka, eknel a hai peuhmah na ne thei ding uh hi
Ahi zongin eknel haite lak pan hita leh khecin kate lak pan hita leh, note in na nek theihloh dingte uh: Kalaoh in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note-a' dingin a nin ahi hi
Sakikh ganhing in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note-a' dingin a nin ahi hi
Bilpi in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note-a' dingin a nin ahi hi
Vok pen khecin ka ahih hangin eknel hailo ahih ciangin note-a' dingin a nin ahi hi
Note in tuate' sa na ne kei ding uh a, a sisate zong na lawng kei ding uh hi. Tuate pen note-a' dingin a nin ahi hi
“Tui sunga omte sung panin nek theih dingte: Tuipi sung hita leh gun sung hita leh tui sungah a om phe leh lip a neite peuhmah na ne thei ding uh hi
Ahih hangin tuipi sung, gun sunga om phe leh lip a neilo, tui sunga a hontat ganhingte leh tui sunga a nungta ganhingte pen note-a' dingin a kihhuai ahi hi
Tuate pen note-a' dingin a kihhuai hi ding hi. Note in tuate' sa na ne kei ding uh a, a sisate zong na kih ding uh hi
Tui sunga a omte sung panin phe leh lip a neilo peuhmah note-a' dingin a kihhuai ahi hi
“Vasate lak panin note in na kih ding uh, a kinelo ding, a kihhuaite: Muvanlai, mupi, luimu
mumeika, musan nam khempeuh
va-ak nam khempeuh
vasa-kalaoh, pengpelep, vatawt, musi nam khempeuh
keising, tuimu, gun vakang
gam vatawt, tui vatawt, musane
gun vapi, gun vazonei nam khempeuh, huihtun, leh bak ahi hi
“Khe li tawh a pai, kha a nei ganhing khempeuhte, note-a' dingin a kihhuai ahi hi
Ahi zongin khe li tawh a pai, kha a nei ganhingte khempeuh lak panin leitungah a tuanna dingun a khepek uh tawh kizom ngaltak tawn a neite na ne thei ding uh hi
Tuate lak panin na nek theih dingte uh: Kauphe kitom nam khempeuh, kauphe zol nam khempeuh, khuangbai nam khempeuh, leh kauphe kisau nam khempeuh ahi hi
Ahih hangin khe li nei-in kha a nei ganhing dangte khempeuh note-a' dingin a kihhuai ahi hi
“Hihte tawh note a nin na suak ding uh hi. A sisa a lawng peuhmahte a nitak mateng a nin hi ding a
a sisa themkhat a pua peuhmah in a puan sawpin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
A khecin a ka ahih hangin eknel a hailo ganhing peuhmah note-a' dingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate a lawng peuhmah a nin hi ding hi
Khe li tawh a pai ganhingte khempeuh lak panin amau' khebom tawh a paite khempeuh note-a' dingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate a sisa a lawngkha peuhmahte a nitak dong a nin hi ding a
a sisa a puapa in a puan sawpin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. Tuate note-a' dingin a nin ahi hi
“Leitungah a vak kawikawi, a pai thei ganhingte lak panin note-a' dingin a ninte: Savokphual, zusa, innhikpi nam khempeuh
tawlbawkpi, tang, tangteuh, leh sehnel gam thankik ahi hi
A hontat ganhing khempeuhte lak panin hihte pen note-a' dingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate a sisa a lawng peuhmah a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi

Tuate a sisa khat peuhpeuh a tukna nate, sing nazat, puan, savun, ippi leh na khat peuhpeuhin a kizang beel khat peuhpeuh hita leh a nin hi ding hi. Tuate pen tui sungah kidiah ding a, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. Tua khit ciangin a siang hi ding hi
Tuate khat peuhpeuh lei beel khat peuhpeuh sungah a kiat leh, tua sunga om khempeuh a nin hi ding a, note in tua beel na sukham ding uh hi
Tua lei beel sungah a om a kine thei ding an tungah tua bang tui a tuk leh a nin hi ding hi. Tua bang beel sunga om dawn theih ding peuhmah a nin hi ding hi
Tua bang a sisa themkhat a tukna peuhmah a nin hi ding hi. Meibung hita leh beelpei hita leh kisuzan ding hi. Tuate a nin hi a, note-a' dingin a kihhuai ahi hi
Ahi zongin tuinak leh tuibem ahih leh a siang hi ding a, ahih hangin a sisate a lawng peuhmah a nin hi ding hi
A kivawh ding khaici tungah tua a sisate themkhat a tuk leh, tua khaici a siang hi ding hi
Ahih hangin khaici tui kidiah a, tua a sisate themkhat tua khaici tungah a tuk leh, note-a' dingin tua khaici a nin ahi hi
“Note' nek theih ding ganhing khat peuhpeuh a sih leh a sisa a lawngpa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi ding a
a sisa a nepa in ama puante sawpin a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. A sisa a puapa in zong ama puante sawpin a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
“Leitungah a hontat ganhing peuhmah a kihhuai hi a, tuate kinelo ding hi
A awmtal peuhmah leh khe li-a a pai peuhmah, ahih kei leh khe tampi a nei, leitungah a pai a hontat ganhing khempeuh, note in na ne kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen a kihhuai ahi hi
A hontat ganhing khat peuhpeuh tawh nomau mah a kihhuai-in na kibawltawm kei ding uh a, tuate tawh nomau na kininsak tawm kei ding uh hi. Na kinitsak tawm uh leh a nin na suak ding uh hi

Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. Tua ahih ciangin note ki-ap un la, kei siangtho ka hih manin note zong siangtho un. Leitungah a bokvak a hontat ganhing khat peuhpeuh tawh note na kininsak tawm kei ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh note' Pasian ahi dingin Egypt gam panin note a hong pai khiatpihpa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi. Tua ahih ciangin kei siangtho ka hih manin note na siangtho ding uh hi,” a ci hi

Hih pen a nin leh a siang, a nungta ganhing nek theih ding leh nek theihloh ding khenna dingin ganhing leh vasa, tui sunga a pai a nungta ganhing khempeuh, leh leitungah a hontat ganhing khempeuh tawh kisai-in ngeina ahi hi.
